// ── Build indices ──
const nameIndex = {};
FAMILIES.forEach(f => {
  Object.entries(f.members).forEach(([gen, names]) => {
    names.forEach(n => {
      n = n.trim(); if (!n) return;
      if (!nameIndex[n]) nameIndex[n] = [];
      nameIndex[n].push({ family_id: f.family_id, gen: parseInt(gen) });
    });
  });
});
const allNames = Object.keys(nameIndex).sort();

// All unique generations present in data
const allGens = [...new Set(FAMILIES.flatMap(f => Object.keys(f.members).map(Number)))].sort((a,b)=>b-a);

// Gen → year mapping (第1屆=1998畢業，1997年創系，所以第N屆=1997+N)
function genToYear(g) { return 1997 + g; }

// ── BUILD GEN GRID ──
(function buildGenGrid() {
  const grid = document.getElementById('genGrid');
  allGens.forEach(g => {
    const btn = document.createElement('button');
    btn.className = 'gen-btn';
    if (g === 29) {
      btn.classList.add('gen-btn-29');
      btn.innerHTML = `第 ${g} 屆<span class="year">${genToYear(g)}</span>`;
      const mimg = document.createElement('img');
      mimg.src = 'data:image/png;base64,';
      mimg.alt = '超有種';
      mimg.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:-12px;right:-10px;width:36px;height:auto;pointer-events:none;';
      btn.appendChild(mimg);
    } else {
      btn.innerHTML = `第 ${g} 屆<span class="year">${genToYear(g)}</span>`;
    }
    btn.onclick = () => selectGen(g, btn);
    grid.appendChild(btn);
  });
})();

let selectedGenBtn = null;
function selectGen(gen, btn) {
  if (selectedGenBtn) selectedGenBtn.classList.remove('selected');
  btn.classList.add('selected');
  selectedGenBtn = btn;
  // card flip animation on the button
  btn.classList.add('flipping');
  setTimeout(() => btn.classList.remove('flipping'), 420);
  renderGenDeck(gen);
}

function renderGenDeck(gen) {
  const deck = document.getElementById('cardDeck');
  deck.style.display = 'block';

  // Collect all people in this gen
  const people = [];
  FAMILIES.forEach(f => {
    const names = f.members[String(gen)];
    if (names) names.forEach(n => people.push({ name: n.trim(), family_id: f.family_id }));
  });
  people.sort((a,b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name, 'zh'));

  deck.innerHTML = `
    <div class="deck-header">
      <div class="deck-title">第 <b>${gen}</b> 屆</div>
      <div class="deck-count">${genToYear(gen)} 年畢業 · ${people.length} 位同學</div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-grid" id="cardGridInner"></div>
  `;

  const inner = document.getElementById('cardGridInner');
  people.forEach((p, i) => {
    const card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'person-card';
    card.style.animationDelay = `${i * 28}ms`;
    card.style.animation = `cardReveal 0.35s ${i*28}ms both`;
    card.innerHTML = `<div class="card-name">${p.name}</div><div class="card-gen-badge">第 ${gen} 屆</div>`;
    card.onclick = () => {
      card.classList.add('flipping');
      setTimeout(() => card.classList.remove('flipping'), 420);
      // Switch to name mode and search
      switchMode('A');
      document.getElementById('tabA').classList.add('active');
      document.getElementById('tabB').classList.remove('active');
      document.getElementById('panelA').classList.add('active');
      document.getElementById('panelB').classList.remove('active');
      document.getElementById('inp').value = p.name;
      setTimeout(() => doNameSearch(), 80);
    };
    inner.appendChild(card);
  });
}

// ── FOLDER CARD RENDERER ──
function isSolo(family) {
  return Object.values(family.members).reduce((s,a)=>s+a.length,0)<=1;
}

function renderFolderCard(family, searchName) {
  const gens = Object.keys(family.members).map(Number).sort((a,b)=>b-a);
  let selfGen = null;
  gens.forEach(g => { if (family.members[g].some(m=>m.trim()===searchName)) selfGen=g; });

  const above = gens.filter(g=>g>(selfGen||0)).length;
  const below = gens.filter(g=>g<(selfGen||0)).length;
  const aboveGens = gens.filter(g=>g>(selfGen||0)).sort((a,b)=>b-a); // high→low
  const belowGens = gens.filter(g=>g<(selfGen||0)).sort((a,b)=>a-b); // low→high

  const tabsH = [
    above>0 ? `<div class="ftab clickable" onclick="sweepRows([${aboveGens.join(',')}])">↑ 學長姐 ${above} 屆</div>` : '',
    `<div class="ftab active" onclick="scrollToSelf('row-gen-${selfGen||0}')">` + (searchName||'—') + `</div>`,
    below>0 ? `<div class="ftab clickable" onclick="sweepRows([${belowGens.join(',')}])">↓ 學弟妹 ${below} 屆</div>` : '',
  ].join('');

  const rowsH = gens.map(g => {
    const members = family.members[g];
    const isSelfRow = g===selfGen;
    const isAbove = selfGen!==null && g>selfGen;
    const isBelow = selfGen!==null && g<selfGen;
    const cls = isSelfRow?'self-row':isAbove?'above':'below';
    const is29 = g === 29;
    const dist = selfGen!==null ? Math.abs(g-selfGen) : 0;
    const delay = isSelfRow ? 0 : dist*55;
    const chips = members.map(m=>{
      const s=m.trim()===searchName;
      return `<div class="chip${s?' self':''}" onclick="clickChip('${m.trim()}')">${m}</div>`;
    }).join('');
    const badge29 = is29 ? `<span class="badge-29"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="超有種" style="height:28px;width:auto;display:block;"></span>` : '';
    return `<div class="gen-row ${cls}${is29?' gen-29':''}" id="row-gen-${g}" style="--d:${delay}ms;animation-duration:0.36s;animation-fill-mode:both;">
      <div class="gen-badge"><span class="gen-num">${g}</span><span class="gen-lbl">屆</span></div>
      <div class="members">${chips}${badge29}</div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');

  const soloH = isSolo(family) ? `<div class="solo-msg"><em>${SOLO_MSGS[Math.floor(Math.random()*SOLO_MSGS.length)]}</em></div>` : '';

  return `<div class="folder-outer">
    <div class="result-eyebrow">Search Result · 查詢結果</div>
    <div class="result-name-heading">「<em>${searchName}</em>」的家族</div>
    <div class="folder-card">
      <div class="folder-tab-strip">${tabsH}</div>
      <div>${rowsH}</div>
      ${soloH}
    </div>
  </div>`;
}

function clickChip(name) {
  switchMode('A');
  document.getElementById('inp').value = name;
  window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'});
  doNameSearch();
}

// ── NAME SEARCH ──
function doNameSearch(forceFamId) {
  const q = document.getElementById('inp').value.trim();
  hideSugg();
  if (!q) return;
  const entries = nameIndex[q];
  if (!entries || !entries.length) {
    document.getElementById('mainResult').innerHTML = `<div class="no-result"><p>找不到「${q}」<br><small style="opacity:0.5;font-size:0.78rem;letter-spacing:0.08em;">請確認姓名是否正確</small></p></div>`;
    return;
  }
  const famIds = [...new Set(entries.map(e=>e.family_id))];
  if (famIds.length>1 && !forceFamId) { openPicker(q, entries, famIds); return; }
  const fid = forceFamId || famIds[0];
  const fam = FAMILIES.find(f=>f.family_id===fid);
  if (!fam) return;
  document.getElementById('mainResult').innerHTML = renderFolderCard(fam, q);
  closePicker();
  document.getElementById('mainResult').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'start'});
}

// ── PICKER ──
function openPicker(name, entries, famIds) {
  document.getElementById('pickerName').textContent = name;
  document.getElementById('pickerOpts').innerHTML = famIds.map(fid => {
    const gens = [...new Set(entries.filter(e=>e.family_id===fid).map(e=>e.gen))].sort((a,b)=>b-a);
    return `<button class="picker-opt" onclick="doNameSearch(${fid})">
      <span>${gens.map(g=>`第 ${g} 屆`).join(' / ')} 的家族</span>
      <span style="opacity:0.4;font-size:0.78rem;">選擇 →</span>
    </button>`;
  }).join('');
  document.getElementById('picker').classList.add('on');
}
function closePicker() { document.getElementById('picker').classList.remove('on'); }
document.getElementById('picker').addEventListener('click', e=>{ if(e.target===e.currentTarget) closePicker(); });

// ── AUTOCOMPLETE ──
const inp = document.getElementById('inp');
const suggs = document.getElementById('suggs');
inp.addEventListener('input', () => {
  const v = inp.value.trim();
  if (!v) { hideSugg(); return; }
  const hits = allNames.filter(n=>n.includes(v)).slice(0,12);
  if (!hits.length) { hideSugg(); return; }
  suggs.innerHTML = hits.map(name => {
    const gens = [...new Set(nameIndex[name].map(i=>i.gen))].sort((a,b)=>b-a);
    return `<div class="sugg-item" onclick="pickSugg('${name}')">
      <span>${name}</span><span class="sugg-gen">第 ${gens.join('、')} 屆</span>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
  suggs.style.display = 'block';
});
function pickSugg(n) { inp.value=n; hideSugg(); doNameSearch(); }
function hideSugg() { suggs.style.display='none'; }
inp.addEventListener('keydown', e=>{ if(e.key==='Enter') doNameSearch(); if(e.key==='Escape') hideSugg(); });
document.addEventListener('click', e=>{ if(!e.target.closest('#panelA')) hideSugg(); });

// ── TAB INTERACTIONS ──
function scrollToSelf(rowId) {
  const el = document.getElementById(rowId);
  if (!el) return;
  el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });
  triggerPulse(el);
}

function sweepRows(genList) {
  if (!genList.length) return;
  // Scroll to first row in the list, then sweep
  const first = document.getElementById('row-gen-' + genList[0]);
  if (first) {
    first.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
  }
  // Wait for scroll to settle, then start the sweep
  setTimeout(() => {
    genList.forEach((g, i) => {
      setTimeout(() => {
        const el = document.getElementById('row-gen-' + g);
        if (!el) return;
        // On the first item, scroll into view; rest just pulse in place
        if (i === 0) el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest' });
        triggerPulse(el);
      }, i * 200);
    });
  }, 350);
}

function triggerPulse(el) {
  el.classList.remove('pulse');
  void el.offsetWidth; // force reflow to restart animation
  el.classList.add('pulse');
  setTimeout(() => el.classList.remove('pulse'), 600);
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
